channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Rhode Island Hacked: Gov. McKee's Office Confirms Release of Stolen Data on Dark Web
item.description: Rhode Island's IT system for health and benefits programs has been hacked, with cybercriminals releasing a set of files on the dark web. The state is urging individuals whose information may have been stolen to take precautions to protect themselves.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
